user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for ChatGPT search features; sites opted out will not appear in search answers

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety and relevance of ad landing pages submitted to ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; not used for automatic crawling or training generative AI models

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for potential use in training generative AI foundation models

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered web access for ChatGPT responses and Custom GPT interactions
user_agents.scope: Visits pages when users ask ChatGPT questions or interact with GPT Actions; not automatic crawling
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt may not apply; user-triggered fetches not subject to automatic crawl policies

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: Public web crawling for training dataset collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; also supports Crawl-delay directive

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users by accessing websites during user-initiated queries
user_agents.scope: Web retrieval triggered by user questions to Claude

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Index web content to improve search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: Web indexing for search optimization and result enhancement

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search indexes and related products
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Discover, Images, Video, News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Crawling images for Google Images and Search features
user_agents.scope: Image-specific crawl for Google Images, Discover, Video, Search image features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Crawling videos for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.scope: Video-specific crawl for Google Search video features and video-dependent products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawling content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News-specific crawl for Google News and news.google.com

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawling product data for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Product-specific crawl for Google Shopping surfaces and Shopping tab

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Fetching content for Google Search testing tools
user_agents.scope: Testing tool crawl for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic fetching for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: General-purpose crawl for internal research and one-off crawls by product teams

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image fetching for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Generic image-specific crawl optimized for fetching publicly accessible image URLs

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video fetching for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Generic video-specific crawl optimized for fetching publicly accessible video URLs

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for Vertex AI Agents requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Site owner-requested crawl for building Vertex AI Agents

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training future Gemini models and grounding Gemini applications
user_agents.scope: Manages content usage for Gemini model training and grounding via robots.txt token

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Crawls for search results indexing, not for training AI foundation models
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt; IP ranges available at https://www.perplexity.com/perplexitybot.json

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web fetches when answering questions
user_agents.scope: Visits web pages when users ask questions, generally ignores robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Configure via WAF or IP blocking; IP ranges available at https://www.perplexity.com/perplexity-user.json

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search technology integrated into Spotlight, Siri, and Safari
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Apple ecosystem search results worldwide
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: / in robots.txt User-agent: Applebot section

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines usage of crawled data for training Apple foundation models and generative AI
user_agents.scope: Secondary user agent processing data from Applebot crawls; does not crawl webpages itself
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Apple Podcasts-specific content; does not follow robots.txt

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta's family of apps (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger) to gather, cache, and display metadata
user_agents.scope: Content from websites/apps shared on Meta platforms; may bypass robots.txt for security/integrity checks
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: /; note: may bypass robots.txt for malware/security checks

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality by analyzing online content for relevance and accuracy
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI capabilities and enable citation/linking in AI responses
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawl the web to improve advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Content crawling for advertising optimization and business intelligence purposes
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content directly
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement via content indexing
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request to support agentic AI capabilities and help AI navigate websites
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch of individual links; may bypass robots.txt as requests are user-initiated
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / in robots.txt; may bypass robots.txt for user-requested fetches

user_agents.name: Copilot-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for live web content in Copilot experiences
user_agents.scope: Fetches content when users explicitly request it in Copilot, for real-time information and summaries

user_agents.name: BingBot
user_agents.purpose: Search index crawling for Bing search engine
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing, respects robots.txt and standard crawling protocols

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search index crawling for Bing search engine
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing, respects robots.txt and standard crawling protocols

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI training

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawl for search indexing in Alexa and Rufus, not for generative AI training

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions like responding to Alexa queries with up-to-date information
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live information to answer customer questions

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Internet research and analysis
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to create a copy of the Internet for research purposes
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; also respects Crawl-delay parameter

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Legacy web crawling for Internet research and analysis
user_agents.scope: Previous version of CCBot; may still identify as CCBot/1.0 in older crawls

user_agents.name: Training crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Collect content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: Focused web crawling for training data acquisition
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt User-agent rules and robots token standards

user_agents.name: Search and retrieval crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Index content for AI search and retrieval systems
user_agents.scope: Web crawling for search result indexing and ranking
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt User-agent rules and standard search directives

user_agents.name: User-triggered fetchers
user_agents.purpose: Fetch content on-demand when users request information
user_agents.scope: On-demand content retrieval triggered by user queries
